chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Narrations Regarding Tawaf.

text: 2838 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَعِيدٌ اَلْأَعْرَجُ : عَنِ اَلطَّوَافِ أَ يَكْتَفِي اَلرَّجُلُ بِإِحْصَاءِ صَاحِبِهِ قَالَ «نَعَمْ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2838 - Sa'id al-A'raj asked Imam (as) about Tawaf (circumambulation) and whether a man can suffice with the counting of his companion.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
